revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-170

That attribute of the auditory sensation in terms of which sounds may be ordered on a scale extending from low to high. 

Pitch depends primarily upon the frequency of the sound stimulus, but it also depends upon the sound pressure and waveform of the stimulus.

Reference: ANSI

{{IALAFooter}}
